TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == satangahan : == Zipun saca Lipun u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :śó•śú¨ nu Amilika :Japen nu Zipun :śó•śú¨ŚõĹ nilacul: i sawalian nu Yaco a tukus ku kitakit nu Zipun, u saupu nu kasakatakatal a ocong nu bayu' kalakanatal, Unu Zipun atu Liwkiw kasaupuan, maala ku enem malebut walu lasebu lima bataan izaw ku tusa(6852) kasaupuan ku kasakatakat, u kumud mazu'ay nu binawlan, ulu bataan izaw ku pitu salabas tu walu(37.8) a emang nu Pinghuwangkungli. I sawalian nu Uya a tukus, matabu nu Taypinyang a bayu, pasaamis u oluses a kanatal, satipan sibiyaw tu Kuliya a Kanatal, saetietipan nu katimul sa, u bayu ku laed tu Tayliwku atu Taywan a kanatal, u binawlan sa, cacay silabas tu tusa ira ku enem a Oku , sakamuketep ku kaaluman nu kasibinawlan nu Sikay ku Zipun, malawit ku tulu malebut lima lasebu(3500) a emang ku tademaw, mazu' i kasatukay nu Tukiw atu lilisay niyazu', u satataangaytu nu masatukayay nu Sikay. u pikuwan nu kitakit sa, liliden nu hungti ku saupu nu giing a patilengtu sakuwan a likec . "Tinnunika" han ku hungti, u kakibana' tu "Zipun" a binawlan atu kanatal. u saupu nu giing atu mamikuwan tu kawaw nu kanatal ku situdungay a mikuwan tu kanatal. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ňź malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ňź
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan : == zipun sa ¶a r~…ĺipun u zuma a kamu : nu ńßur~…ĺam :** nu amir~…ĺika :*ap…ôn nu zipun :*** nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ: i sawar~…ĺian nu ja ¶o a tukus ku kitakit nu zipun, u saupu nu kasakatakatar~…ĺ a o ¶oŇč nu baju Ē~ ° kar~…ĺakanatar~…ĺ, unu zipun atu r~…ĺiwkiw kasaupuan, maar~…ĺa ku …ôn…ôm mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu r~…ĺas…ôbu r~…ĺima bataan izaw ku tusa(****) kasaupuan ku kasakatakat, u kumud mazu Ē~ °aj nu binawr~…ĺan, ur~…ĺu bataan izaw ku pitu sar~…ĺabas tu war~…ĺu(**.*) a …ômaŇč nu piŇčńßuwaŇčkuŇčr~…ĺi. i sawar~…ĺian nu uja a tukus, matabu nu tajpinjaŇč a baju, pasaamis u or~…ĺus…ôs a kanatar~…ĺ, satipan sibijaw tu kur~…ĺija a kanatar~…ĺ, sa…ôti…ôtipan nu katimur~…ĺ sa, u baju ku r~…ĺa…ôd tu tajr~…ĺiwku atu tajwan a kanatar~…ĺ, u binawr~…ĺan sa, ¶a ¶aj sir~…ĺabas tu tusa ira ku …ôn…ôm a oku , sakamuk…ôt…ôp ku kaar~…ĺuman nu kasibinawr~…ĺan nu sikaj ku zipun, mar~…ĺawit ku tur~…ĺu mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima r~…ĺas…ôbu(****) a …ômaŇč ku tad…ômaw, mazu Ē~ ° i kasatukaj nu tukiw atu r~…ĺir~…ĺisaj nijazu Ē~ °, u satataaŇčajtu nu masatukajaj nu sikaj. u pikuwan nu kitakit sa, r~…ĺir~…ĺid…ôn nu ńßuŇčti ku saupu nu giiŇč a patir~…ĺ…ôŇčtu sakuwan a r~…ĺik…ô ¶ . "tinnunika" ńßan ku ńßuŇčti, u kakibana Ē~ ° tu "zipun" a binawr~…ĺan atu kanatar~…ĺ. u saupu nu giiŇč atu mamikuwan tu kawaw nu kanatar~…ĺ ku situduŇčaj a mikuwan tu kanatar~…ĺ. namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan * mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan *
S.FORM: == satangahan : == Zipun saca Lipun u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :śó•śú¨ nu Amilika :Japen nu Zipun :śó•śú¨ŚõĹ nilacul: i sawalian nu Yaco a tukus ku kitakit nu Zipun, u saupu nu kasakatakatal a ocong nu bayu' kalakanatal, Unu Zipun atu Liwkiw kasaupuan, maala ku enem malebut walu lasebu lima bataan izaw ku tusa(6852) kasaupuan ku kasakatakat, u kumud mazu'ay nu binawlan, ulu bataan izaw ku pitu salabas tu walu(37.8) a emang nu Pinghuwangkungli. I sawalian nu Uya a tukus, matabu nu Taypinyang a bayu, pasaamis u oluses a kanatal, satipan sibiyaw tu Kuliya a Kanatal, saetietipan nu katimul sa, u bayu ku laed tu Tayliwku atu Taywan a kanatal, u binawlan sa, cacay silabas tu tusa ira ku enem a Oku , sakamuketep ku kaaluman nu kasibinawlan nu Sikay ku Zipun, malawit ku tulu malebut lima lasebu(3500) a emang ku tademaw, mazu' i kasatukay nu Tukiw atu lilisay niyazu', u satataangaytu nu masatukayay nu Sikay. u pikuwan nu kitakit sa, liliden nu hungti ku saupu nu giing a patilengtu sakuwan a likec . "Tinnunika" han ku hungti, u kakibana' tu "Zipun" a binawlan atu kanatal. u saupu nu giing atu mamikuwan tu kawaw nu kanatal ku situdungay a mikuwan tu kanatal. namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ňź malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ňź
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan : == zipun sa ¶a r~…ĺipun u zuma a kamu : nu ńßur~…ĺam :** nu amir~…ĺika :*ap…ôn nu zipun :*** nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ: i sawar~…ĺian nu ja ¶o a tukus ku kitakit nu zipun, u saupu nu kasakatakatar~…ĺ a o ¶oŇč nu baju Ē~ ° kar~…ĺakanatar~…ĺ, unu zipun atu r~…ĺiwkiw kasaupuan, maar~…ĺa ku …ôn…ôm mar~…ĺ…ôbut war~…ĺu r~…ĺas…ôbu r~…ĺima bataan izaw ku tusa(****) kasaupuan ku kasakatakat, u kumud mazu Ē~ °aj nu binawr~…ĺan, ur~…ĺu bataan izaw ku pitu sar~…ĺabas tu war~…ĺu(**.*) a …ômaŇč nu piŇčńßuwaŇčkuŇčr~…ĺi. i sawar~…ĺian nu uja a tukus, matabu nu tajpinjaŇč a baju, pasaamis u or~…ĺus…ôs a kanatar~…ĺ, satipan sibijaw tu kur~…ĺija a kanatar~…ĺ, sa…ôti…ôtipan nu katimur~…ĺ sa, u baju ku r~…ĺa…ôd tu tajr~…ĺiwku atu tajwan a kanatar~…ĺ, u binawr~…ĺan sa, ¶a ¶aj sir~…ĺabas tu tusa ira ku …ôn…ôm a oku , sakamuk…ôt…ôp ku kaar~…ĺuman nu kasibinawr~…ĺan nu sikaj ku zipun, mar~…ĺawit ku tur~…ĺu mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima r~…ĺas…ôbu(****) a …ômaŇč ku tad…ômaw, mazu Ē~ ° i kasatukaj nu tukiw atu r~…ĺir~…ĺisaj nijazu Ē~ °, u satataaŇčajtu nu masatukajaj nu sikaj. u pikuwan nu kitakit sa, r~…ĺir~…ĺid…ôn nu ńßuŇčti ku saupu nu giiŇč a patir~…ĺ…ôŇčtu sakuwan a r~…ĺik…ô ¶ . "tinnunika" ńßan ku ńßuŇčti, u kakibana Ē~ ° tu "zipun" a binawr~…ĺan atu kanatar~…ĺ. u saupu nu giiŇč atu mamikuwan tu kawaw nu kanatar~…ĺ ku situduŇčaj a mikuwan tu kanatar~…ĺ. namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan * mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan *
